name: Karen's Infamous Baked Bean/cp
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Rotel Whole Tomatoes or 2 cans Hunt's spicy brands
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the crock pot.
2. Cook on low for 12-14 hours.
3. Stir every couple of hours if possible.
4. Once finished cooking, scoop some of the liquid from the top.
5. Mix in a couple teaspoons of corn starch until well combined.
6. Return the mixture back to the beans and stir thoroughly.
7. This will help thicken the beans nicely.
